name: Reflex Cat Pocket Treat Dental Care 60g
description: It helps reduce tartar formation and maintain dental health with its special components and vitamins. Thanks to its taurine content, it supports the immune system, heart health, and visual functions. Composition: Derivatives of vegetable origin (including 4% vegetable fibre), meat and animal derivatives, cereals, oils and fats, vegetable protein extracts, minerals (0.2% sodium tripolyphosphate). Nutrient Components Crude Protein 29% Fat Content 20% Crude Fibre 3,6 % Crude Ash 6%   Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin A 6000 IU, Vitamin D3 400 IU, Vitamin E 100 mg, Taurine 1000 mg. Antioxidants.
